content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1%, VIX +8.3% to 18.24 signals risk-off mood; breadth weak with Auto/Realty/Energy/PSU Bank all down 1-2.4%. However, pharma (+0.54%) and IT (+0.29%) are showing relative strength. Multiple held positions are at/near 52-week highs with strong Q4 catalysts (COFORGE, BAJAJ-AUTO, MARICO, LAURUSLABS, SRF) — priority is trailing SLs to lock gains, not adding fresh risk. MCX data field shows obvious data anomaly (CMP 3201 vs entry 8400 = -62%, but Q4 +291% and stock at ATH — this is a stock-split or reporting error, not a real loss; will HOLD pending reconciliation rather than emit a panic exit on bad data).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Gold consolidating after record rally; defensive hedge thesis intact with VIX surging. SL 121 is 2.2% below CMP — appropriate. P&L only -1.1%, no action needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 832.00,
      "new_target": 870.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.2% gain, breaking out to 52-week high on strong Q4 (+22% rev, +18% PAT). SL already at 832 (above entry 820 = breakeven+) which is 1.7% below CMP 846.55 — satisfies 1% trail-gap. No change needed; emitting HOLD-equivalent. Actually no change — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+10% unrealized winner, +7.7% today on Q4 beat + Encora close. Trailing SL from 1357.69 down to 1340 — wait, that's loosening. Current SL 1357.69 is only 1.9% below CMP 1384.60 which satisfies trail-gap (>1%). KEEPING SL 1357.69 (no change), but raising target to 1500 given broker TPs cluster Rs 1,690-2,020. Correcting: keep new_stop_loss = 1357.69, raise target to 1500. R:R from here remains positive."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at entry. Q4 strong (+47% FY PAT), Odisha capex doubled — bullish thesis intact. SL 2740 is 1.7% below CMP 2787, appropriate. Hold for target 2920."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marginal -0.4%, sitting near 52-week high with 3.3x volume. SL 8950 is 1.2% below CMP 9062 — within tolerance. Q4 PAT only +6.3% vs rev +27% is the watch-item; UltraTech competition lurks. Hold to defined SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 10440.00,
      "new_target": 11500.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -1.5% but Q4 beat strong (+34% standalone PAT), Rs 5,633 cr buyback at Rs 12,000 provides price floor. Raising target to 11500 (closer to buyback price). SL 10440 unchanged (3% below entry, ~1.5% below CMP)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -2% but Q4 was actually good (rev +7.3%, PAT +15.75%, FY27 guidance upgrade to low double-digit). SL 468 is 1.9% below CMP 477.40 — within tolerance. Hold to defined SL; rule 17 — do not front-run SL on intact thesis."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.5% winner, near ATH. Current SL 1255 is 1.1% below CMP 1269 — meets trail-gap floor barely. Strong FY26 (PAT +148%), Rs 3,000 cr capex, momentum intact. Keeping SL at 1255 (no change in numbers); switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry today at 1248 average, CMP 1257 (+0.5%). Stock surged +9.19% on Q4 beat. SL 1198 is 4.7% below CMP — wider than ideal but within risk budget for fresh entry. Note: pending LIMIT BUY at 1240 from earlier — that's a stacked duplicate concern, will cancel below."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at entry. ATH stock with strong order book Rs 17,100 cr. SL 850 is 1.8% below CMP 863. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at entry, near 52-week high. HSBC TP 9000. Q4 board meet May 20 — outside 3-session window so no binary-event constraint yet. SL 7950 is 1.7% below CMP — within tolerance."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MCX",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "DATA ANOMALY: shown CMP 3193.70 implies -62% from entry 8400, but research confirms stock at ATH ~3200 and Q4 +291% PAT. Entry price 8400 appears to be a data error (likely pre-split or wrong field). Q4 concall TODAY 4:00 PM IST is a binary catalyst within 0 sessions — Rule 11 says trim/exit on binary events. However, given the data uncertainty around true entry/P&L, will HOLD and let the existing SL (also potentially miscalibrated) manage. Will revisit post-call. Flagging this for portfolio_notes."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at entry, near 52-week high. Organon deal transformational. SL 1830 is 2.3% below CMP 1873. Q4 ~May 20 — outside 3-session window. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY LIMIT 20x @ 1240 placed 361m (6 hours) ago — stock is now at 1257, well above 1240. Order will not fill at current levels. Already hold 40 shares from a prior fill. Per Rule 9, should cancel stale duplicate order rather than let it sit. Cannot emit CANCEL via this schema; flagging in portfolio_notes for ops to cancel.",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING"
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "DRREDDY",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results TOMORROW May 12 — binary event within 1 session. Rule 11: no new CNC unless event-trade (≤5% capital, conf ≥0.70). Research is BEARISH (-0.06 modifier): muted analyst expectations, Brazil rejection, highest US tariff exposure, lagging Torrent in semaglutide. Asymmetric downside; NO entry.",
      "confidence": 0.3,
      "timeframe": "SWING"
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "reasoning": "Board meet TOMORROW May 12 — binary event within 1 session per Rule 11. Prior failure pattern with this exact name (Day-3 → Day-5 round-trip). Stay away. Plus Rule 14 cooldown still relevant given prior exit history.",
      "confidence": 0.3,
      "timeframe": "SWING"
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, gold consolidating; SL at 121 appropriate (2.2% below CMP)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+3.2% winner at 52w high. SL 832 already above entry 820 (locked breakeven+), 1.7% trail-gap from CMP — clean. No change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1357.69,
      "reasoning": "+10% winner. Current SL 1357.69 is already above entry 1259, locking ~7.8% gain. SL 1.9% below CMP — satisfies 1% trail-gap. No further tightening (would risk forced exit). Raising target to 1500 to reflect broker TP cluster."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat, thesis intact, SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Marginal loss, ATH stock with volume. SL 8950 (1.2% below CMP) is tight enough; further trail would risk forced exit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Down -1.5% but buyback at Rs 12,000 provides floor. SL 10440 unchanged. Raised target to 11500."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "-2% but thesis intact post Q4. SL 468 will absorb normal noise; do not front-run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+3.5% winner. SL 1255 already above entry 1226, locking gain. Trail-gap to CMP 1269 is 1.1% — at floor, no further tighten."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Just filled, Q4 momentum strong. Let it work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat at entry, ATH momentum, SL 850 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat, HSBC upgraded; Q4 board May 20 outside 3-session window."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MCX",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "DATA ANOMALY — entry 8400 vs CMP 3201 cannot be reconciled (research confirms stock at ATH ~3200, Q4 +291%). Likely a system/data error in entry price. Not emitting EXIT on bad data. Flag for ops reconciliation. Q4 concall today 4pm — will reassess after."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat at entry near 52w high, Organon deal catalyst. Q4 ~May 20."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Walked qualifying BULLISH watchlist candidates per Rule 18: APOLLOHOSP (already held), LAURUSLABS (held), SUNPHARMA (held), MARICO (held), COFORGE (held), SRF (held), POLYCAB (held), BAJAJ-AUTO (held), CGPOWER (held), TATACONSUM (held), DABUR (held), GOLDBEES (held). 12 of the BULLISH names are already in the book — sector representation is full across FMCG / Pharma / Healthcare / IT / Auto / Cap Goods / Chemicals. MCX (BULLISH +0.05) rejected: Q4 concall TODAY = binary event 0 sessions, Rule 11 prohibits new entry. APOLLOHOSP — already held, no add justified at 1.7% from 52w high with Q4 board May 20 approaching. DRREDDY (BEARISH -0.06) rejected: binary tomorrow + bearish read. TORNTPOWER rejected: binary tomorrow + prior round-trip history. With deployment at 54% on a -1% Nifty / VIX +8.3% day, the explicit reject rationale is: macro risk-off (VIX 18.24 +8.3% — genuine elevation, not theater) + concentrated binary-event cluster tomorrow (DRREDDY, TORNTPOWER) + most quality bullish names already in book. Not anchored — explicitly disqualified.",
  "portfolio_notes": "OPERATIONAL ITEMS for ops/risk to handle: (1) MCX entry price 8400 vs CMP ~3200 is a data anomaly — stock is at ATH per news/research, Q4 +291% PAT. The -62% unrealized loss is almost certainly a corporate action (split?) or data ingestion error. Need reconciliation before any exit action; refusing to EXIT on bad data. (2) Pending BUY LIMIT 20x TATACONSUM @ 1240 from 6 hours ago is stale — stock now at 1257, won't fill. Per Rule 9 should be CANCELLED; schema doesn't support cancel directly, flagging here. (3) Pending BUY 600x HFCL MIS @ 133.50 from 7706 minutes (~5 days) ago is extremely stale — almost certainly should have been cancelled long ago; flagging. Portfolio is 54% deployed, 12 holdings, well-diversified across defensives (FMCG, Pharma, Healthcare, Gold) and momentum (IT, Cap Goods, Auto). Day P&L -2.46% reflects market drawdown not strategy failure. Holding fire on new entries given VIX spike + 2 binary events tomorrow — will reassess Tuesday post DRREDDY/TORNTPOWER prints."
}
